content:
5.5 Electrical Characteristics (continued)

over operating free-air temperature range ($T_J = -40^\circ\text{C}$ to $+125^\circ\text{C}$), $V_{\text{IN}} = V_{\text{OUT}} + 0.5\text{ V}$ or $1.45\text{ V}$ (whichever is greater), $I_{\text{OUT}} = 1\text{ mA}$, $V_{\text{EN}} = V_{\text{IN}}$, and $C_{\text{IN}} = C_{\text{OUT}} = 1\text{ \mu F}$ (unless otherwise noted); all typical values are at $T_J = 25^\circ\text{C}$.
